description_long: This object consists of two modern, boxy residential houses facing each other across a narrow street, each surrounded by a wooden fence and small green lawns. The houses are constructed with light tan brick facades, flat roofs, and a mix of large and small rectangular windows, some with black frames and balcony railings. The rear and side yards are enclosed by wooden fencing, and the street between the houses features a yellow center line and sidewalks. The roofs are flat and appear to have rooftop access or utility structures. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced apart. The entryways are simple, with no visible porches or overhangs, and the overall design is minimalist and functional.
description: A pair of modern, flat-roofed residential houses with tan brick exteriors, fenced lawns, and asymmetrical windows facing each other across a narrow street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades of both houses, with large windows, doors, and fenced green lawns.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow street, sidewalks, and the rear and side fencing of both houses.
description_view_2: Rear view of the houses, highlighting the backyards and additional windows, with less architectural detail than the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the street, sidewalks, and fenced yards from the other direction.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryways with flat doors, no visible porch or overhang, and minimal decorative elements.
